top_findings.name: eshwarvijay/agent-architecture
top_findings.description: The 21 agentic design patterns, distilled to concepts (no code) — a design-phase reference for building AI agents. Works as a Claude Code skill.

top_findings.name: vibestackdev/vibe-stack
top_findings.description: 29 .mdc architecture rules that prevent AI coding assistants from hallucinating insecure auth, deprecated imports, and broken Next.js 15 patterns. Built for Cursor Agent and Claude Code.

top_findings.name: clewisdev/agentic-firehose
top_findings.description: Personal knowledge base for agentic engineering: curated captures of working practitioners' posts on Claude Code, agent     harnesses, memory architectures, prompting patterns, and tool use. Sources distilled into topic notes and cross-source synthesis.      Optimised for one reader's recall and frank reassessment, not as public docs.
